item.title: Voice Commands List
item.dc:creator: MrShake
item.content:encoded:
Jaecoo J7 Voice Commands List

General Commands

  • "Hey Jaecoo, open the sunroof."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, close the sunroof."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, turn on the air conditioning."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, turn off the air conditioning."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, increase the temperature to [desired temperature]."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, decrease the temperature to [desired temperature]."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, turn on the headlights."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, turn off the headlights."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, navigate to [destination]."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, play [song/artist/playlist]."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, call [contact name]."

Navigation Commands

  • "Hey Jaecoo, take me home."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, find the nearest gas station."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, find a nearby restaurant."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, what's the traffic like to [destination]?"
  • "Hey Jaecoo, show me the map."

Media and Entertainment Commands

  • "Hey Jaecoo, play the radio."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, change to [radio station]."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, increase the volume."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, decrease the volume."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, skip to the next song."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, pause the music."

Climate Control Commands

  • "Hey Jaecoo, set the temperature to [degrees] Celsius."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, turn on the seat heater."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, turn off the seat heater."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, turn on the defroster."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, turn off the defroster."

Phone and Communication Commands

  • "Hey Jaecoo, call [contact name]."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, answer the call."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, hang up the call."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, read my last message."

Additional Features

  • "Hey Jaecoo, open the trunk."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, close the trunk."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, turn on/off ambient lighting."
  • "Hey Jaecoo, activate voice assistant."

This list provides an overview of the available voice commands for the Jaecoo J7, helping users easily control various vehicle functions hands-free.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: This list provides an overview of the available voice commands for the Jaecoo J7, helping users easily control various vehicle functions hands-free.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: i found it dosnt respond to hey jaecoo it only responds to hello jaecoo then these comands work

item.title: Jaecoo J7 PHEV Super Hybrid System
item.dc:creator: MrShake
item.content:encoded: <!-- wp:embed-pdf-viewer/pdf {"id":10881,"title":"J7 PHEV - Super Hybrid System (SHS)","description":{"raw":"","rendered":"\u003cp class=\u0022attachment\u0022\u003e\u003ca href='https://www.jaecooforums.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/J7-PHEV-Super-Hybrid-System-SHS.pdf'\u003eJ7 PHEV - Super Hybrid System (SHS)\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n"},"url":"https://www.jaecooforums.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/J7-PHEV-Super-Hybrid-System-SHS.pdf"} /-->

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: A lot of false information being given for these vehicles ie Two x programmable keys ( car only remembers 1 and that’s the last key used) V2L facility ( which is greyed out on the screen and unable to activate it) Car has been back to dealership and they don’t have a clue . I’ve left feedback on the Phev App and have had NO reply what so ever 🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬

V2L lead should have been supplied by OMODA/JAECOO with the car on collection They are happy to show sales video’s with people using the system ie boiling kettle cooking and watching the films on the rear parcel shelf screen. Also mentioned in their on-line Manual
this video is showing a kia not a jaecoo or omoda

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: How long did it take to fit?

item.title: Jaecoo J7 Fuse Box
item.dc:creator: MrShake
item.content:encoded:
Passenger compartment

In the passenger compartment, the fuse box is located in the lower part of the dashboard on the driver’s side. The protective cover must be removed for access.

Assignment

Fuse number 27 for 15A is responsible for the operation of the front cigarette lighter.

Engine compartment

Under the hood, in the engine compartment on the left side, there is a basic block with fuses and relays.

Designation

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Unable to Gain access through the front panel due to a speaker being fitted to it on the inside
Did you find a solution for this removal?

hello, A Jaecoo j7 1.5 exclusive, We bought the car on the first day and opened the sunroof for the first time, then noticed that it didn't close completely, stopping about 3-4 mm short and not fitting into place properly. some have any experience with, is there a solution for?

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: So I have page 1 of the JAECOO 5 EV manual and nothing else pops up…what else do I need to do???
